channel.title: InnerSource Case Studies on InnerSource Commons
channel.description: Recent content in InnerSource Case Studies on InnerSource Commons

item.title: Reboot Untapped: Fostering Innovation and Collaboration within the UN
item.description: Introduction to the Work Done The “Reboot Untapped” initiative is a collaborative effort between the United Nations’ Office of Information and Communications Technology (OICT) and the Business Transformation and Accountability Division (BTAD).
